research_question: Is the mean weight of students different from 68.0 kg?
estimate_summary: The sample mean weight is 68.556 kg based on n = 14041 students.
confidence_interval_interpretation: A 95% confidence interval for the population mean weight is (68.274, 68.837) kg.
hypothesis_test_interpretation: The one-sample t-test gives t = 3.862, df = 14040, p-value = 0.000113, so the decision is: Reject H0.
context_conclusion: In context, this means the average student weight in the dataset is significantly different from 68.0 kg at the 5% significance level.
